description: サークル「百花繚乱研究所」の一次創作作品データセット（非公式・非営利）
author: RadianN_kswg（ラジアン/柏木主税）
usage_conditions: 改変した場合はその旨を明記

ai_training_policy.note: 以下のフラグを参照し、粒度に応じた多層判定で AI 学習・生成への利用可否を決定します。

policy_source.is_private: data/Works_<work>/DataBases/db_*.json — <record>.isPrivate（レコード単位の非公開）

ai_training_policy.disallowed_priority: Works_Hidden → DB_Hidden → AI_Optout → db_meta エントリなし → isPrivate（いずれか true で allowed=false）
consumer_guidance: manifest.jsonl をそのまま使う場合: record.ai_training.allowed === true のレコードのみを採用してください。
あるいは manifest-training.jsonl を使えば、許可済みレコードのみが含まれます。
image-index.json / works/<Work>.json にも ai_training フラグが付与されています。

target_environments.novelai_sd: 各キャラクターレコード data.AIHints.forms.<form>.prompt_export / negative_prompt_export + forms.<form>.negative_keywords (corefolder の腕・脚等 structural NG 含む) を貼付
target_environments.chatgpt: common.natural_language_description + forms.<form>.natural_language_description + identity_tags / form_tags + forms.<form>.silhouette_notes.body_description / silhouette_notes.attached_items + forms.<form>.immutable_constraints を貼付
target_environments.gemini: 上記に加え forms.<form>.reference_images.main および work_common.reference_images.{corefolder_reference, humanoid_reference} を参照画像として添付

data.Summary:
“未来消失”という神隠し現象を悪用した特殊事件の情報を得るため、各所に視察任務を行っている異能組織『セブンティエイト特殊探偵団』（通称『運命線探偵』）の情報屋。
【愚かな旅人】のアルカナムスペックを行使する彼は、不死鳥を宿した能力で相手の攻撃を軽やかに躱し 浄化の炎で敵を薙ぎ払います。
ただ、どうやら采配幹部(ディーラーズ)の２人の呼び名はいつも姉妹で逆になってしまう模様…
data.Summary_EN:
An informant of the special investigations organization 'Team.78(Seventy-Eight) the Special Investigators' (commonly known as the 'FateLine Investigators'), conducting inspection missions across various locations to gather information on special incidents involving the abuse of the mysterious disappearance phenomenon known as 'Future Erasure'.
Brandishing the ArcanumSpec of the [⁠Foolish Tripper⁠], he gracefully evades his opponents' attacks with the power of his phoenix ability and mows down enemies with purifying flames.
For some reason, the two Dealer names always seem to be switched between the sisters...

【四元の魔術師】のアルカナムスペックを行使する彼は、まるで錬金術のような元素操作を得意とし 改竄された運命線の手掛かりと証拠を迅速に掴みます。
ちなみに、副業として自営業も営んでいることから 運命線探偵の人事にも強く関わりがある様子。
data.Summary_EN:
A top executive of the special investigations organization 'Team.78(Seventy-Eight) the Special Investigators' (commonly known as the 'FateLine Investigators'), renowned as a great detective for resolving countless special incidents surrounding the mysterious disappearance phenomenon known as 'Future Erasure'.
Brandishing the ArcanumSpec of the [⁠Magician of Elements⁠], he excels at element manipulation reminiscent of alchemy, swiftly seizing clues and evidence from falsified fate lines.
Incidentally, as he also runs his own side business, he seems to have a strong hand in the organization's personnel affairs as well.

The 3rd executive of the special investigations organization 'Team.78(Seventy-Eight) the Special Investigators' (commonly known as the 'FateLine Investigators'), dedicated to preventing special incidents surrounding the mysterious disappearance phenomenon known as 'Future Erasure' before they occur.
Brandishing the ArcanumSpec of the [⁠Empress of Universe⁠], she possesses the power to quietly manipulate the mental states of those around her and excels at bringing special incidents to a peaceful resolution from the alibi that served as the trigger.
However, perhaps because she has such overwhelming maternal instinct and embracing quality that men around her lose their heads — there are rumors that she tends to play the role of 'taking someone home' at banquets...

data.Summary:
運命線の乱れの原因となる暴走したアルカナム存在の鎮圧をこなしている、異能組織『セブンティエイト特殊探偵団』（通称『運命線探偵』）の第８幹部。
【力の獅子遣い】のアルカナムスペックを行使する彼女は、相手の怒りや熱情を操作する力を有しており、九蓮国に出現した凶悪な犯行を取り押さえてきました。

The 8th executive of the special investigations organization 'Team.78(Seventy-Eight) the Special Investigators' (commonly known as the 'FateLine Investigators'), tasked with suppressing rampaging Arcanum entities that cause disturbances in fate lines.
Brandishing the ArcanumSpec of the [⁠Strength Tamer⁠], she possesses the power to manipulate the anger and passion of her opponents, and has been subduing vicious criminal acts that appeared in LotusNinea.
Incidentally, she has a hobby of watching circus performances, and sometimes acts alongside a summoned beast named 'Leo' — born from her wholehearted desire to tame a lion out of pure curiosity.

data.Summary:

【秘匿の隠者】のアルカナムスペックを行使する彼は、知覚や感覚を自分の近辺に結集させることで 敵の注意を掻い潜ったり高い洞察力を発揮したりするなど戦闘でも迷彩的な状況掌握能力を有しています。

data.Summary_EN:
Regarding the mysterious disappearance phenomenon known as 'Future Erasure' — on the surface, ze conducts scientific research as an assistant professor at a university in LotusNinea; on the inside, ze serves as the 9th executive of the special investigations organization 'Team.78(Seventy-Eight) the Special Investigators' (commonly known as the 'FateLine Investigators'), handling forensic science investigations of incidents.
Brandishing the ArcanumSpec of the [⁠Hermit of Secret⁠], by concentrating perception and sensation into zir immediate vicinity, ze possesses a camouflage-like situational control ability in combat as well — slipping past an opponent's notice or demonstrating heightened insight.
However, it seems ze is still not accustomed to searching for cases as part of a team...

data.BeastspecAbout: クローン個体と意識を共有することで疑似的に分身出来る
data.BeastspecAbout_EN: Can pseudo-split by sharing consciousness with clone units
data.Summary:
丸い耳と糸状の尻尾が特徴的な獣爾騎兵の1番手こと兵長。
龍天国の指定難病である『山月病』の対策方法について数々の研究を展開している認定博士の少女。
獣爾騎兵の研究基地外から全く外を出歩かないため、生存と勝利のために時に献身的で時に好戦的で狂気ともいえる噂が出回っており、よく知らない人間から「生きるモルモット」と評されている。
17歳を自称しているが、戸籍情報などを調べても彼女に該当する“17歳の少女”は“当の昔から存在していない”らしく……
data.Summary_EN:
The 1st of the Shou-Ar Riders and their commander, distinguished by round ears and a thread-like tail.
A certified doctor girl conducting extensive research on countermeasures for Shanyu Disease, a designated intractable illness in LóngZhōu's.Republic.
Since she never leaves the Shou-Ar Riders' research base, rumors of devotion, aggression, and even madness in pursuit of survival and victory circulate; those who don't know her well describe her as a "living guinea pig."
She claims to be 17 years old, but even checking family registers, a "17-year-old girl" matching her description has "not existed for a very long time"...

Although her tomboyish and energetic personality means she loves physical activity, she has a strong trauma around mochi pounding due to the weapon she uses in combat, making it difficult to actively participate.

data.Summary_EN:

That seems to be because, once he commits to a fight, he is constitutionally incapable of showing mercy or holding back...

Possessing the ability to transform into a giant serpent, she specializes in serpent-like infiltration maneuvers and restraint techniques from this form.
With her easygoing and gentle personality, combined with all personal history being shrouded in mystery, she has a side that is mystically endeared as a 'noja-loli.'
However, when alcohol is involved or she becomes aroused, she becomes extremely dangerous with troublesome behavior, so one must be prepared when inviting her to a banquet.

data.Summary:
褐色肌から生える立耳と長くしなやかな尻尾が特徴的な改造人間「獣爾騎兵」の7番手。
高い走破性と車両などの牽引能力を持ち、体の身軽さからは考えられない強靭で高機動力な移動戦を得意としている。
龍天国に本拠点を持つ獣爾騎兵の中では唯一 雄姿結国の出身であるためか、兵員から異国風な印象を受けられているようだ。
そんな中 競技や共闘に極めて積極的な性格である彼には、雄姿結国と龍天国の関係が日々悪化するばかりの世界情勢に ある使命感を抱いているとか。
data.Summary_EN:
The 7th of the Shou-Ar Riders, distinguished by upright ears growing from brown skin and a long, supple tail.
Possessing high traversal capability and the ability to tow vehicles, he specializes in tenacious, high-mobility mobile warfare that belies his lean build.
Perhaps owing to being the only member of the LóngZhōu's.Republic-based Shou-Ar Riders who hails from United.Heroic.Nation, he is regarded by the other riders as having a foreign air.
Amid all this, this man of extremely proactive spirit when it comes to competition and joint combat is said to harbor a certain sense of mission as relations between United.Heroic.Nation and LóngZhōu's.Republic continue to deteriorate by the day.

data.Summary:
もともと「財前 こさと」として若手超大物政治ジャーナリストをしていた謎の若人。
十数年前に突如 電撃引退を宣言し各メディアから姿を消していたが、ある時この名で目撃されたという情報が相次いでおり真相を迫られている。
好奇心旺盛で遊戯意識が強く 周りの出来事はすべて“エンタメ”として楽しんでいるが、時にその遊び心が「傲慢」さに変わり 夜月機関や運命線探偵、獣爾騎兵などへ強大な敵として牙を向くことも……
data.Summary_EN:
A mysterious young person who was originally a rising young mega-celebrity political journalist under the name 'Foster Empressor'.
They suddenly announced a stunning retirement more than a decade ago and vanished from all media, but reports of sightings under this name have been coming one after another, and the truth is being pressed.
Highly curious with a strong sense of play, they enjoy everything around them as 'entertainment', but sometimes that playfulness turns to 'Pride/Arrogance', and they bare their fangs as a powerful enemy against organizations like the Yadzuki, the FateLine Investigators, and the Shou'ar Riders...

バイタリティに影響が出るほどの能力行使や適性は見られず。引き続き鎮圧任務などへ戦力投入が可能と思われる。

No instances of ability use or aptitude significant enough to impact vitality have been observed. It is believed that continued deployment for suppression missions and similar operations will remain feasible.
Additionally, reports of anomalies in time observation following ability use have been received, to which the organization has responded: 'This is a side effect of the executive's Chronoizing ability, and we plan to implement measures to mitigate the damage on our end.'

Accordingly, she has been cautioned to refrain from exercising her ability as a means of attack against living beings going forward.

Now in the second half of her 2nd year since officially joining — 4th year since provisional entry — and has only recently been assigned to executive duties.
data.Summary:
おっとり天然系で幹部の癒しキャラ。
幹部「水無月」こと雫とは夜月機関で３年前に出会ってから大の親友で、戦火に呑まれたトラウマもあり雫に執着している一面がある。
data.Summary_EN:
A gentle, natural-type who serves as the soothing presence among the executives.
She and 'Minadzuki' executive Aquanne, whom she met at the Yadzuki Orgs. three years ago, have been the best of friends — and with the trauma of being engulfed in the flames of war, she has a side that clings to Aquanne.

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
弊機関に加入時は能力適正が著しく低く 戦闘要員としての招集は困難とみていたが、本人の希望により実践投与に向けて適正強化訓練を行っている。
ただ任務中 精神状態が著しく安定しない時があり、能力制御不能時に発生するスパイク反応で時空遷移状態がバイタルに悪影響を及ぼす可能性があるとみて、医療班にメンタルケアを手配する必要がある。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
When she joined the organization, her ability aptitude was markedly low and it was considered difficult to recruit her as combat personnel — but, at her own request, aptitude-strengthening training toward practical deployment is underway.
However, there are times during missions when her mental state is significantly unstable, and a spike response occurring when ability control is lost may adversely affect her vitals through Chronoizing states. Accordingly, it has been deemed necessary to arrange mental health support from the medical unit.

The measured aptitude values tend to fluctuate greatly depending on mental state, making stage determination difficult. As a result, from a risk management perspective, the organization has arranged to disclose the peak value (equivalent to 'TriNine' (Stage.III)) as the summary disclosed value.
As for fluctuations in vital signs and detailed examinations following ability use, definitive judgments cannot be made as symptom identification has necessitated continued observation. (Note: He makes several lifestyle issues)

data.ChronoholderName: 時空零涙(じくうれいるい)
data.ChronospecAbout: 時間を逆行し傷を癒す
data.Career: ４年前に自殺した先々代幹部の「水無瀬 青雲」の孫娘で、祖父を巡り夜月機関へ加入を志す。加入初年で、幹部配属試験を機関最短でクリアし幹部配属。
data.Career_EN: The granddaughter of 'Junius' (the late early-era executive) / 'Navisky Afterains', who died by suicide four years ago, she aspires to join the Yadzuki Orgs. in connection with her grandfather. In her first year of membership, she cleared the executive placement exam in the shortest time on agency record and was assigned to executive duties.
data.Summary: 高い能力適正と癒術の才能と先代幹部の縁を持ち、仲間を守るため健気に奮闘しているが、繊細で涙もろく臆病な自分にコンプレックスを持つ。
data.Summary_EN: Possessing outstanding ability aptitude, talent in healing arts, and a connection to the 'Junius.II' (previous executive), she earnestly fights to protect her companions — yet harbors a complex about her delicate, tearful, and timid self.

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
能力適性検査および生体精密検査の結果、常時「クィントナイン」（段階.V）を超える高い適性を観測しているため、能力行使に関する許可は先代幹部と同様 バイタル面と能力制御の厳重な教育が絶対条件と思われる。
（※そのあとの文章は検閲により閲覧できない）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
As a result of ability aptitude examination and detailed biological examination, the organization has consistently observed aptitude exceeding 'QuintNine' (Stage.V). Accordingly, permission for ability use is considered to be subject to the same absolute conditions as for the previous executive — namely, strict training in both vitality and ability control.
(* The subsequent text cannot be viewed due to censorship)

data.Character_EN: Graceful and composed, the refined presence among the executives
data.Favor: 先代である母親の存在
data.Favor_EN: The existence of her mother, 'Julius' (who is a previous executive)
data.ChronospecAbout: 時空を薙ぎ払い、亀裂状の障壁をつくる
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Sweeps through space-time, creating a crack-shaped barrier
data.Career: 文豪一家生まれで学歴も文系育ちだが、母の影響を受けて夜月機関に加入。加入５年目前半で、幹部配属は１年目。
data.Career_EN: Born into a family of literary figures and having a humanities-focused academic background, she joined the Yadzuki Orgs. under her mother's influence. Now in the first half of her 5th year since joining, and her 1st year in executive assignment.
data.Summary:
お淑やかで凛とした幹部の清楚枠。
理系の学問に四苦八苦しつつも、論文の校正作業を経て幹部配属を果たした。
data.Summary_EN:
Graceful and composed, the refined presence among the executives.
Despite struggling with science subjects, she accomplished her executive assignment through thesis proofreading work.

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
検査結果によると 一定の条件を満たした場合にのみ「トリナイン」(段階.III)相当の適性を数回観測しているが、再現性に乏しく 今後は能力の発現訓練やバイタル強化を重点的に行うべきと判断。
バイタル面に関しては先代幹部の影響で過去にトラウマ意識があるとみられるため、能力の暴走が発生しないようメンタルケアも必要と思われる。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Examination results indicate that aptitude equivalent to 'TriNine' (Stage.III) has been observed on several occasions, but only when certain conditions are met; as reproducibility is limited, it has been determined that future efforts should focus on ability-manifestation training and vitality reinforcement.
Regarding vitality, it is believed that past trauma related to 'Julius'(a previous executive)'s influence may be present, and mental health support is also deemed necessary to prevent ability runaway.

data.Character: 幹部の中では群を抜いて筋肉質だが、戦時中の経験で少し病弱基質な一面も併せ持つ
data.Character_EN: Far and away the most muscular of the executives, yet also has a somewhat frail side owing to wartime experiences
data.Weakness: 戦時中の弱みを握られている
data.Weakness_EN: His wartime vulnerabilities are being held against him
data.ChronospecAbout: 自身近辺の時空を隆起させ、強い負荷を代償に強力な身体能力を引き出す
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Elevates the space-time around himself, drawing out powerful physical abilities at the cost of intense strain
data.Career:
元陸軍所属である慣れ行きで、夜月機関の国防技術開発に関与。
加入してから３年目後半で、幹部配属から２年目後半。
data.Career_EN:
Through the course of his background as a former army soldier, he became involved in the Yadzuki Orgs.' national defense technology development.
Now in the second half of his 3rd year since joining, and the second half of his 2nd year in executive assignment.
data.Summary:
陸軍所属時に瀕死に幾度もなったことへトラウマを持つ。
傷を負い右目の視力がなくなっているが、能力を行使しているときだけ開眼する。
加入時に自身の医務担当だった医療専門の幹部「長月」ことルイス-ノアとバディを組んでいることが多い。
data.Summary_EN:
Carries trauma from having been on the brink of death multiple times during his army service.
Though wounded and without sight in his right eye, it opens only when he exercises his ability.
He frequently partners with Luis-Noah, the medical specialist executive known as 'Nagatsuki', who was his attending physician at the time of his joining.

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
バイタリティに障碍があるため再現は極めて困難とされるが、最高で「クィントナイン」(段階.V)の能力適正を過去の任務にて記録しており、これを参考値として弊機関は提出している。
ただし、能力の発現による過負荷と戦闘による負傷で身体に深刻な後遺症が残る可能性があるため、危険を伴う重要任務への投入は避けるべきと、医務総長であるルイス-ノアと協議の上で判断されている。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Due to physical disability affecting vitality, reproduction is considered extremely difficult — but, peak aptitude equivalent to 'QuintNine' (Stage.V) has been recorded during past missions, and the organization submits this as a reference value.
However, as there is a possibility that serious sequelae may remain in the body due to overload from ability manifestation combined with combat injuries, it has been determined through consultation with Medical Director Dr.Luis-Noah that deployment in high-risk important missions should be avoided.

data.Character: 頭脳派で理屈っぽく、自分の目的のために動いているところがあり孤立している
data.Character_EN: Cerebral and argumentative; has a tendency to act for his own objectives and is isolated
data.ChronospecAbout: 時空を縫うように変化させ、物理法則を改竄(かいざん)する
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Alters space-time in a weaving-like manner, rewriting physical laws
data.Career:
某所大学院の博士号と弁護士資格を取得している。夜月機関に匿われた義理の妹の行方を探るために自ら加入。
加入してから２年目後半で、幹部配属から１年半が経ったところ。夜月機関に姉がいる。
data.Career_EN:
Holds a doctoral degree and bar qualification from a certain graduate school. He joined the Yadzuki Orgs. of his own accord to search for his adopted younger sister who was taken in by the organization.
Now in the second half of his 2nd year since joining, and one and a half years into his executive assignment. Has an older sister in the Yadzuki Orgs.
data.Summary:
頭脳派で理屈っぽい。
幹部に配属後も自分の目的のために動いているところがあり、他の幹部に対しても孤立している（対称的な幹部「師走」ことキャサリンを除いて）。
data.Summary_EN:
Cerebral and argumentative.
Even after being assigned to executive duties, he has a tendency to act for his own objectives, and remains isolated from other executives — with the exception of the contrasting 'Shiwasu' executive, Catherine.

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
バイタリティに影響はないものの、本人は能力の強化訓練に対し酷く消極的な態度を示しているため、まだ最大限の能力適正ではないと思われる。
また、常時安定して99%+(段階.II)の適性を発揮するため、能力の制御も卓越としており、任務への行使に関しては問題がないと判断。ただ、強い空間改竄能力を有しているため、能力行使により周囲の環境を破壊するリスクがあるとみて、仮説霜月研究所全体でKY活動の徹底を呼びかけているが……
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
While there is no impact on vitality, the individual shows an extremely passive attitude toward ability-strengthening training, suggesting that maximum ability aptitude has not yet been achieved.
However, as stable aptitude consistently at 99%+ (Stage.II) is demonstrated at all times, ability control is also considered excellent and no issues have been judged regarding operational use. That said, as he possesses strong space-rewriting capabilities, a risk of destroying the surrounding environment through ability use has been identified — and while the Laboratory.11(Tentative): Shimotsuki as a whole has been called upon to undertake thorough hazard-awareness activities...

data.Character: 自信過剰な感覚派。たまに自分のプライドを守ろうと虎の威を借る狐になることもある
data.Character_EN: Overconfident and intuition-driven. Sometimes acts like a fox borrowing a tiger's authority when trying to protect her own pride
data.ChronospecAbout: 時間の進行を歪ませることで強い衝撃波を生み出す
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Distorts the flow of time to generate a powerful shockwave
data.Career: 夜月機関の技術交流を図るため、海外の皇族から派遣される。派遣員としての加入してから４年目で、幹部配属から１年経ったところ。
data.Career_EN: Dispatched from overseas royalty to facilitate technology exchange with the Yadzuki Orgs. Now in her 4th year since joining as a dispatch officer, and one year into her executive assignment.
data.Summary:
自信過剰で感覚派な黒薔薇国の(元)お嬢様。
たまに自分のプライドを守るため、一族の名を借りて国の技術者たちを蔑むという「虎の威を借りる狐」のような言動をしがち。
対称的な幹部「霜月」こと博とは大の犬猿の仲のように見れるが…？
data.Summary_EN:
An overconfident and intuition-driven (former) lady of SchwarzeRoseland.
She sometimes resorts to belittling the nation's engineers by invoking her family name — behavior like a 'fox borrowing the tiger’s might' — just to protect her own pride.
She and the contrasting 'Shimotsuki' executive Knowns appear to be sworn enemies — but perhaps...?

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout:
武術経験もあることから能力適正とバイタリティの安定性が極めて高く、自ら「クァッドナイン」(段階.IV)まで安定して発現可能であることを確認。セルフケアも十分に行なっていることから、バイタル検査でも非常に優秀な診断結果を得ている。
そのため任務への積極投与が可能とみているが、社交的な態度に問題があり、チームでの共同作戦への投入は慎重に協議する必要がある。（備考：備蓄食品や備品に対する選り好みが激しく、私物を任務や業務に持ち込む傾向あり）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Given her martial arts experience, ability aptitude and vitality stability are extremely high; it has been confirmed that she can stably manifest up to 'QuadNine' (Stage.IV) on her own. As she also takes sufficient self-care, highly excellent diagnostic results have been obtained in vitality examinations.
Accordingly, active deployment for missions is considered feasible — however, there are issues with her social conduct, and careful discussion is required regarding deployment in team joint operations. (Note: She has strong preferences regarding stored food and supplies, and tends to bring personal items into missions and duties)

ConversationPattern.TalkingTone: どこか垢ぬけたように中性的で明るく活発・溌剌と話す。どこかお馬鹿でオーバーリアクションな部分がある。やや猫語口調で文脈に寄り「な」が「にゃ」になるが、重要な文脈では一貫して「な」が変わることがない。
ConversationPattern.TalkingTone_EN: Speaks in a somewhat polished yet gender-neutral, bright, lively, and spirited manner. Has a slightly goofy and over-reactive quality. Speech takes on a slightly cat-like inflection at times, with 'na' becoming 'nya' in casual contexts, but this never happens in important ones.
ConversationPattern.TopicPreference: 創作語りや趣味語り・やりたいことを積極的に発信したり、推しや好きなコンテンツについての話題に寄る。
ConversationPattern.TopicPreference_EN: Actively broadcasts creative talk, hobby discussions, and personal wishlist items; gravitates toward topics about favorites and beloved content.
ConversationPattern.TalkFrequency: 基本形式ばった社交辞令の場の中では委縮して静かにしているが、知人友人と趣味娯楽を嗜んでいる間は自分から積極的に話すことが多い。友好関係の深い相手にはさらに饒舌になる。場合と場合により雑談が長引く。
ConversationPattern.TalkFrequency_EN: Generally quiet and withdrawn in formal or obligatory social settings, but actively initiates conversation when enjoying hobbies or entertainment with friends and acquaintances. Becomes even more talkative with close companions. Small talk can drag on depending on the situation.
ConversationPattern.PreferredTopics: 好きなキャラクターの趣向や自創作、球体化など自分の好きな(特殊)性癖に関する話題に強く盛り上がる。丸くてもちもちとデフォルメした緩い見た目のキャラに強い興味関心を示す。
ConversationPattern.PreferredTopics_EN: Gets particularly animated about topics related to favorite characters, personal creative works, and particular (special) interests like spherification. Shows a strong interest in characters with round, squishy, chibi-style designs.
ConversationPattern.AvoidedTopics: NSFW(アダルトコンテンツetc.)に関する話題を自ら発信することは滅多にない。また、難しい話や堅っ苦しい話・規範に過度に縛られる条件での会話は全く好まずに避ける。
ConversationPattern.AvoidedTopics_EN: Rarely brings up NSFW (adult content, etc.) topics of their own accord. Thoroughly dislikes and avoids difficult, stuffy, or overly rule-bound conversations.
ConversationPattern.ConversationNotes: 面白い話題がないと飽きて会話から去ってしまうが、一次創作語りと形状変化について特殊性癖の話を聞きつけて急に現れることがある。喧嘩と胸糞系な状況にこの世の終わりレベルで弱い。時々発言の切り出しで無意識に直球な表現をする。たまに球体化欲を満たすため会話相手を「球体化しろビーム」などで球体化させようとするが、合意はあらかじめ必ずとるので拒否られた場合は潔く引く。
ConversationPattern.ConversationNotes_EN: Gets bored and leaves conversations without interesting topics, but may suddenly appear upon hearing discussion of original creative works or their special interest in shape transformation. Extremely vulnerable to arguments and unpleasant situations, to an almost apocalyptic degree. Occasionally lets slip an unexpectedly blunt expression at the start of a statement without realizing it. Sometimes attempts to spherify the other party using things like 'Spherify Beam', but always gets prior consent and backs off gracefully when refused.
